title: cryptogramma gracilis
intro: Cryptogramma gracilis, also known as the rocky brittle fern, is a rare and unique plant species native to the Pacific coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cryptogramma gracilis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to protect against infections. It can be prepared as a tincture or tea, and is also used in herbal preparations such as salves and creams to promote skin health and tissue repair.
